stemHtml: A German airline has to establish an operator security programme in writing and:

options.a: implement and maintain it. The programme must comply with the national civil aviation security programme of Germany.
options.b: implement and maintain it. The programme must comply with the European aviation security programme of ICAO.
options.c: hand deliver it to the competent authority. The programme must comply with the international civil aviation transport airline security programme of IATA.
options.d: implement and maintain it. The programme must comply with the European aviation security programme of EASA.
